meaning: n.[动]南非产的大羚羊之一种
examples: Eventually, their curiosity satisfied, they heed their mother, and leave the gemsbok to its fate.
The park is the home to thousands of wildebeest, zebra and gemsbok, especially around the nxai pan area.
They were packed with images of wide farms, dry riverbeds, windswept veld, frolicking gemsbok and scratching guinea fowl.
The rare black-faced impala is often viewed here too, as are herds of Gemsbok, wildebeest, zebra, giraffe and rhino.
Grasses provide food for springbok, gemsbok and oryx.
